description: Post a comment on a Bitbucket Cloud pull request or repository issue (REST POST .../comments). Optional parent_comment_id creates a reply when Bitbucket accepts replies for that resource.

resource.description: Whether the comment is on a pull_request or issue.

resource_id.description: Pull request id or issue id (same numeric id used in REST paths for that resource).

parent_comment_id.description: Optional parent comment id to post a reply.
